summary: ExamVault DPI MVP validated end-to-end. 12/12 backend pytest suites PASS (stats, exams, centres, candidate register+verify, application, admit card, vault multi-sig 3-of-5 including duplicate-signature guard, reset, centre dashboard, answer-sheets, evaluator queue+submit, results, certificate verify, analytics). Frontend loads cleanly on mobile viewport (390x844) with dark glassmorphism theme; landing exposes all 7 required testIDs (role-candidate, role-vault, role-centre, role-evaluator, role-analytics, explore-platform-button, verify-cert-cta). Vault flow verified visually: SEALED → sign AUTH-1/2/3 via [data-testid=vault-sign-AUTH-*] → status flips to UNLOCKED with 3/3 threshold and SIGNED badges; vault-reset-button works. Centre dashboard shows metrics + chain-of-custody timeline with hashes. Evaluator queue shows 5 sheets with marks +/- and Submit to Blockchain CTA. Analytics + Impact + Public /verify/[id] render VERIFIED badge with block height, tx hash and history. Candidate register created CND-* server-side and navigated to /candidate/verify with cid+exam query params (backend integration confirmed).

ui_bugs.issue: Continue button lacks a testID (e.g. register-continue); flow works via text selector but automation is brittle
Cert ID input and Verify submit button have no testIDs (cert-id-input, verify-cert-submit); dynamic /verify/[id] works fine
Queue list items and Submit-to-Blockchain button missing testIDs (queue-item-*, submit-evaluation)
No testID on status badge (vault-status) — status flip must be asserted via body text

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents deprecated' (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: Add testIDs listed above to improve test automation (register-continue, cert-id-input, verify-cert-submit, queue-item-*, submit-evaluation, vault-status)
Migrate deprecated RN Web style props (shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents) to silence warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py excludes _id correctly via projections and doc.pop; models & Pydantic validation clean
Vault duplicate-signature guard validated (same authority signing twice does not double-count)
All endpoints use env-driven MONGO_URL/DB_NAME; frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — no hardcoded URLs
Deterministic SHA-256 mocks used for blockchain/signature as specified; MOCKED items acknowledged

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all screens render, all critical flows work; only missing/inconsistent testIDs on a few components

seed_data_creation: One TEST_ candidate + application created via API tests (prefixed TEST_ per convention); no destructive changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_examvault_backend.py — 12 tests, all pass. Vault testIDs are `vault-sign-<AUTH-ID>`, `vault-reset-button`, `vault-release-button`. Landing testIDs all present. Missing testIDs listed above.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. MOCKED integrations (blockchain anchoring, AI face verification, digital signatures via SHA-256) behave deterministically and consistently as designed.
